title: [FIRRTL][Dedup] Fix issue with NLAs on ExtModule ports
skipped_reason: no SV content - this is an internal MLIR/CIRCT compiler bug fix in the FIRRTL deduplication pass. The issue describes a bug in how the compiler handles Named Local Annotations (NLAs) on ExtModule ports during dedup, but does not contain any SystemVerilog code constructs or patterns that can be abstracted into features.
